description: Pins the three shared field-required rejections and the create POST body. Both languages omit booted (API defaults true) and backups_enabled (API default) unless the caller sets them, while forwarding the selected authentication method.

cases.name: requires firewall_id
cases.expect_error: firewall_id is required for instance creation. Get a firewall ID from linode_firewall_list, or create one with linode_firewall_create.

cases.name: creates an instance with a public interface
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This operation creates a billable resource. Set confirm=true to proceed.
